div.class: flex min-h-screen flex-col bg-gradient-to-br from-indigo-900 via-blue-900 to-purple-900

nav.class: flex w-full items-center justify-between bg-white/10 px-8 py-4 shadow-lg backdrop-blur-md

button.class: rounded-lg bg-indigo-600 px-4 py-2 font-semibold text-white shadow transition hover:bg-indigo-500

section.class: flex flex-1 flex-col items-center justify-center px-4 py-16 text-center

h1.class: mb-4 text-4xl font-extrabold text-white drop-shadow-lg md:text-6xl

section.p: Avtau LSchool is your all-in-one platform for adaptive practice and mastery in every subject. Real-time analytics, step-by-step guidance, and a vibrant learning community help every student thrive.

span.class: rounded-full bg-indigo-700/80 px-4 py-2 font-medium text-white shadow
rounded-full bg-blue-700/80 px-4 py-2 font-medium text-white shadow
rounded-full bg-purple-700/80 px-4 py-2 font-medium text-white shadow
rounded-full bg-pink-700/80 px-4 py-2 font-medium text-white shadow
rounded-full bg-yellow-600/80 px-4 py-2 font-medium text-white shadow

a.class: inline-block rounded-lg bg-white px-8 py-3 text-lg font-bold text-indigo-700 shadow-lg transition hover:bg-indigo-100

div.class: flex flex-col items-center rounded-xl bg-indigo-800/80 p-6 text-white shadow
div.p: Track progress, spot trouble areas, and celebrate mastery with powerful analytics for teachers and parents.

div.class: flex flex-col items-center rounded-xl bg-blue-800/80 p-6 text-white shadow
div.p: Every question adapts to the student's level, giving targeted practice on exactly the skills they need to grow.

div.class: flex flex-col items-center rounded-xl bg-purple-800/80 p-6 text-white shadow
div.p: Earn badges, certificates, and more as you master new skills and subjects.

footer.class: mt-auto bg-gradient-to-t from-indigo-900/80 to-transparent py-6 text-center text-sm text-indigo-200
